title: triticum secundum
intro: Triticum secundum, also known as wild spelt, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum secundum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular well-being. Triticum secundum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
